subject: [PATCH 14/19] nfsd: use test_and_clear_bit for somebody_reclaimed to prevent lost update

2026-06-09.patch_summary: This patch fixes a potential issue in the NFS daemon where a concurrent set operation could be lost due to a race condition between testing and clearing a flag. The patch replaces separate test_bit() and clear_bit() calls with a single atomic test_and_clear_bit() call, ensuring that the read-and-clear operation is atomic and preventing lost updates.
